message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber

title Ants Simulation Sequence Diagram

participant "Control" as Control
participant "Graph" as Graph
participant "nodes[i]:Node" as Node
participant "ants[i]:Ant" as Ant

activate Control
Control -> Graph: getNodes()
activate Graph
Graph -->> Control: nodes
deactivate Graph

loop [nodes]
    opt [nodes[i].getContent() instanceof FreeNode]
        activate Control
        Control -> Node: getAnts()
        activate Node
        Node -->> Control: frms
        deactivate Node
        
        loop [fourmis]
            opt [ants[i] instanceof MovableAnt]
                Ant -> Ant: move()
            endopt
        endloop
        deactivate Control
    endopt
endloop

deactivate Control
@enduml
```
